text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I drop by the infirmary to find...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did I... fall asleep?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, it's this late?! Wh-what's going on here?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, you fell asleep shortly after taking the
tablet I prescribed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Although, you woke up earlier than I expected...
Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No matter. Your skin, posture, the glint in your
eyes—everything appears to be in excellent
condition. The experiment was a success!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
E-experiment? But I thought I took a new type of
supplement...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And indeed you did. A brand new innovation from
the mind of yours truly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's the ultimate supplement! The more fatigued
you are at the time of ingestion, the more restful
of a sleep you will have!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're my first non-rodent subject. And
considering the evidence, I'd say this is a huge
success.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But why?! I've still got so much to do today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's far too obvious you've been overexerting
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ack! Well...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: B-but I need to try harder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, slow down. I heard something most
intriguing the other day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of your path, all athletes are fighting
an uphill battle with their physical limits, trying to
reach the top of their own mountain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Comparing training to climbing a mountain is
rather ingenious, I'd say.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The peak you aim for, the course you choose, the
tools you use and people you climb with... Timing
the trek based on your condition and
environment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You could prepare everything perfectly, but what
do you think would happen if you tried to climb
the whole mountain without breaks?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well... that's just an accident waiting to happen, I
guess.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, thus proving that thorough rest leads to
prime bodybuilding!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thorough rest, huh? If you say so, Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll take care to start taking rest more seriously
from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Now that's settled, we're ready to move
things along to the next phase.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Next... phase?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's say the supplement I first prescribed you is
called "Tablet A". What I'm about to inject into
you now is... "Solution B".

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With the lingering remnants of Tablet A in your
body as a catalyst, you should in theory feel even
more refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No, nope, out of the question! I'm done with that!
I've had plenty of rest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? If I don't inject you
with the solution, the Tablet A compounds in your
body will explode!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! Y-y-you're joking, right?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it was merely a jest. A necessary act to draw
your attention.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I've already injected you with the solution.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm really... getting... slee...py...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...In fact, all I did was give your arm a slight poke
with my fingernail.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sweet dreams, Scarlet. Rest well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Considering you were fatigued enough to fall into
slumber from a mere placebo, I'd say you need it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? You there—would you care for a moment of
respite?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I run off in a mad panic.
